In [55]:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns

%matplotlib inline
In [56]:
df = pd.read_csv("../data/real_estate_data.csv")

df.head()
Out[56]:
Price Status Area Rate per sqft Property Type Locality Builder Name RERA Approval BHK_Count Society Company Name Flat Type
0 10700000 Under Construction 1138 9,450 2 BHK Apartment in M3M Antalya Hills Phase I Sector 79 home Approved by RERA 2 M3M Antalya Hills Phase I M3M Apartment
1 14400000 Under Construction 1528 9,450 3 BHK Apartment in M3M Antalya Hills Phase I Sector 79 Property In Gurgaon Approved by RERA 3 M3M Antalya Hills Phase I M3M Apartment
2 10700000 Under Construction 1138 9,450 2 BHK Apartment in M3M Antalya Hills Phase I Sector 79 properties for sale in Gurgaon Approved by RERA 2 M3M Antalya Hills Phase I M3M Apartment
3 40000000 Ready to move 4500 8,888 4 BHK Independent Floor Sector 57 MM India Pvt Ltd Not approved by RERA 4 Outside society Outside Plot
4 24000000 Under Construction 1800 13,333 3 BHK Independent Floor in Anant Raj Estate Plots Sector 63 MM India Pvt Ltd Approved by RERA 3 Anant Raj Estate Plots Anant Floor

In [59]:
df.columns
Out[59]:
Index(['Price', 'Status', 'Area', 'Rate per sqft', 'Property Type', 'Locality',
       'Builder Name', 'RERA Approval', 'BHK_Count', 'Society', 'Company Name',
       'Flat Type'],
      dtype='str')

Clean column names¶

In [60]:
df.columns = df.columns.str.strip().str.lower().str.replace(" ", "_")

df.columns
Out[60]:
Index(['price', 'status', 'area', 'rate_per_sqft', 'property_type', 'locality',
       'builder_name', 'rera_approval', 'bhk_count', 'society', 'company_name',
       'flat_type'],
      dtype='str')

Clean numeric columns¶

In [61]:
df["price"] = df["price"].astype(str).str.replace(",", "", regex=False)
df["price"] = pd.to_numeric(df["price"], errors="coerce")

df["rate_per_sqft"] = df["rate_per_sqft"].astype(str).str.replace(",", "", regex=False)
df["rate_per_sqft"] = pd.to_numeric(df["rate_per_sqft"], errors="coerce")

df["area"] = pd.to_numeric(df["area"], errors="coerce")

Clean text columns¶

In [62]:
text_columns = ["status", "property_type", "locality", "builder_name", 
                "rera_approval", "society", "company_name", "flat_type"]

for col in text_columns:
    df[col] = df[col].astype(str).str.strip().str.lower()

Remove duplicates¶

In [63]:
df = df.drop_duplicates()

df.shape
Out[63]:
(14223, 12)

Highest average price by locality¶

In [73]:
locality_avg_price = df.groupby("locality")["price"].mean().sort_values(ascending=False).head(10)

locality_avg_price
Out[73]:
locality
baliawas                  5.833333e+08
sector 42                 5.023612e+08
beverly park              1.953667e+08
aralias drive             1.636583e+08
golf course road          1.475139e+08
sector 73                 1.281941e+08
37d dwarka exp gurgaon    1.197000e+08
ambience island           1.100000e+08
sector 24                 1.086423e+08
sector 113                9.808106e+07
Name: price, dtype: float64

Visualize top localities by average price¶

In [74]:
plt.figure(figsize=(14,7))

# Style
sns.set_style("whitegrid")

# Barplot
ax = sns.barplot(
    x=locality_avg_price.values,
    y=locality_avg_price.index,
    hue=locality_avg_price.index,
    palette="viridis",
    legend=False
)

# Title and labels
plt.title(
    "Top 10 Localities by Average Property Price",
    fontsize=18,
    fontweight='bold',
    pad=20
)

plt.xlabel(
    "Average Property Price",
    fontsize=13,
    fontweight='bold'
)

plt.ylabel(
    "Locality",
    fontsize=13,
    fontweight='bold'
)

# Add value labels
for i, v in enumerate(locality_avg_price.values):
    ax.text(
        v,
        i,
        f"₹{v:,.0f}",
        va='center',
        fontsize=10,
        color='black',
        fontweight='bold'
    )

# Remove top/right borders
sns.despine(left=False, bottom=False)

# Adjust layout
plt.tight_layout()

# Save image
plt.savefig("../images/top10_locality_prices.png", dpi=300, bbox_inches='tight')

# Show chart
plt.show()

Visualize rate per sqft¶

In [76]:
# Figure size
plt.figure(figsize=(14,7))

# Style
sns.set_style("whitegrid")

# Plot
ax = sns.barplot(
    x=locality_rate.values,
    y=locality_rate.index,
    hue=locality_rate.index,
    palette="magma",
    legend=False
)

# Title
plt.title(
    "Top 10 Localities by Average Rate per Sqft",
    fontsize=18,
    fontweight='bold',
    pad=20
)

# Labels
plt.xlabel(
    "Average Rate per Sqft",
    fontsize=13,
    fontweight='bold'
)

plt.ylabel(
    "Locality",
    fontsize=13,
    fontweight='bold'
)

# Add value labels
for i, v in enumerate(locality_rate.values):
    ax.text(
        v,
        i,
        f"₹{v:,.0f}",
        va='center',
        fontsize=10,
        fontweight='bold'
    )

# Clean design
sns.despine()

# Layout
plt.tight_layout()

# Save image
plt.savefig(
    "../images/top10_locality_rate.png",
    dpi=300,
    bbox_inches='tight'
)

# Show plot
plt.show()

Ready-to-move vs Under-construction¶

In [77]:
status_price = df.groupby("status")["price"].median().sort_values(ascending=False)

status_price
Out[77]:
status
resale                36500000.0
under construction    28600000.0
ready to move         26000000.0
new                   13450000.0
Name: price, dtype: float64

Visualization¶

In [78]:
plt.figure(figsize=(10,6))

# Style
sns.set_style("whitegrid")

# Plot
ax = sns.barplot(
    x=status_price.index,
    y=status_price.values,
    hue=status_price.index,
    palette="coolwarm",
    legend=False
)

# Title
plt.title(
    "Median Price by Property Status",
    fontsize=18,
    fontweight='bold',
    pad=20
)

# Labels
plt.xlabel(
    "Property Status",
    fontsize=13,
    fontweight='bold'
)

plt.ylabel(
    "Median Price",
    fontsize=13,
    fontweight='bold'
)

# Value labels
for i, v in enumerate(status_price.values):
    ax.text(
        i,
        v,
        f"₹{v:,.0f}",
        ha='center',
        va='bottom',
        fontsize=10,
        fontweight='bold'
    )

# Clean look
sns.despine()

# Layout
plt.tight_layout()

# Save image
plt.savefig(
    "../images/median_price_by_status.png",
    dpi=300,
    bbox_inches='tight'
)

# Show plot
plt.show()

Area vs Price Relationship¶

In [81]:
plt.figure(figsize=(12,7))

# Style
sns.set_style("whitegrid")

# Scatter Plot
sns.scatterplot(
    data=df,
    x="area",
    y="price",
    color="royalblue",
    alpha=0.6,
    s=70,
    edgecolor="black"
)

# Title
plt.title(
    "Area vs Property Price",
    fontsize=18,
    fontweight='bold',
    pad=20
)

# Labels
plt.xlabel(
    "Area (Sqft)",
    fontsize=13,
    fontweight='bold'
)

plt.ylabel(
    "Property Price",
    fontsize=13,
    fontweight='bold'
)

# Grid styling
plt.grid(alpha=0.3)

# Clean look
sns.despine()

# Layout
plt.tight_layout()

# Save image
plt.savefig(
    "../images/area_vs_price_scatter.png",
    dpi=300,
    bbox_inches='tight'
)

# Show plot
plt.show()

Correlation Heatmap¶

In [82]:
numeric_df = df.select_dtypes(include=np.number)

numeric_df.head()
Out[82]:
price area rate_per_sqft bhk_count
0 10700000 1138 9450 2
1 14400000 1528 9450 3
2 10700000 1138 9450 2
3 40000000 4500 8888 4
4 24000000 1800 13333 3

Heatmap¶

In [83]:
plt.figure(figsize=(12,8))

# Style
sns.set_style("white")

# Heatmap
sns.heatmap(
    numeric_df.corr(),
    annot=True,
    fmt=".2f",
    cmap="coolwarm",
    linewidths=0.5,
    linecolor='white',
    square=True,
    cbar_kws={"shrink": 0.8},
    annot_kws={"size": 10, "weight": "bold"}
)

# Title
plt.title(
    "Correlation Heatmap",
    fontsize=20,
    fontweight='bold',
    pad=20
)

# Rotate labels
plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha='right', fontsize=10)
plt.yticks(rotation=0, fontsize=10)

# Layout
plt.tight_layout()

# Save image
plt.savefig(
    "../images/correlation_heatmap.png",
    dpi=300,
    bbox_inches='tight'
)

# Show plot
plt.show()

Visualization¶

In [85]:
bhk_price_fixed = bhk_price[(bhk_price.index >= 1) & (bhk_price.index <= 10)]

plt.figure(figsize=(11,6))

sns.set_style("whitegrid")

ax = sns.barplot(
    x=bhk_price_fixed.index,
    y=bhk_price_fixed.values,
    hue=bhk_price_fixed.index,
    palette="flare",
    legend=False
)

plt.title(
    "Average Price by BHK Count",
    fontsize=18,
    fontweight='bold',
    pad=20
)

plt.xlabel("BHK Count", fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')
plt.ylabel("Average Price", fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')

# Format y-axis in Crores
ax.yaxis.set_major_formatter(
    plt.FuncFormatter(lambda x, pos: f"₹{x/10000000:.1f} Cr")
)

# Value labels in Crores
for i, v in enumerate(bhk_price_fixed.values):
    ax.text(
        i,
        v,
        f"₹{v/10000000:.1f} Cr",
        ha='center',
        va='bottom',
        fontsize=10,
        fontweight='bold'
    )

sns.despine()
plt.tight_layout()

plt.savefig(
    "../images/avg_price_by_bhk.png",
    dpi=300,
    bbox_inches='tight'
)

plt.show()

Visualization¶

In [87]:
# Top 10 Property Types by Average Price
top_property_type = property_type_price.sort_values(ascending=False).head(10)

plt.figure(figsize=(14,7))

# Style
sns.set_style("whitegrid")

# Plot
ax = sns.barplot(
    x=top_property_type.index,
    y=top_property_type.values,
    hue=top_property_type.index,
    palette="Set2",
    legend=False
)

# Title
plt.title(
    "Top 10 Property Types by Average Price",
    fontsize=18,
    fontweight='bold',
    pad=20
)

# Labels
plt.xlabel(
    "Property Type",
    fontsize=13,
    fontweight='bold'
)

plt.ylabel(
    "Average Price",
    fontsize=13,
    fontweight='bold'
)

# Format y-axis in Crores
ax.yaxis.set_major_formatter(
    plt.FuncFormatter(lambda x, pos: f"₹{x/10000000:.1f} Cr")
)

# Value labels
for i, v in enumerate(top_property_type.values):
    ax.text(
        i,
        v,
        f"₹{v/10000000:.1f} Cr",
        ha='center',
        va='bottom',
        fontsize=10,
        fontweight='bold'
    )

# Rotate labels
plt.xticks(rotation=20, ha='right')

# Clean look
sns.despine()

# Layout
plt.tight_layout()

# Save image
plt.savefig(
    "../images/top_property_type_price.png",
    dpi=300,
    bbox_inches='tight'
)

# Show plot
plt.show()

Area vs Rate per Sqft¶

In [90]:
plt.figure(figsize=(12,7))

# Style
sns.set_style("whitegrid")

# Scatter Plot
sns.scatterplot(
    data=df,
    x="area",
    y="rate_per_sqft",
    color="darkorange",
    alpha=0.6,
    s=70,
    edgecolor="black"
)

# Title
plt.title(
    "Area vs Rate per Sqft",
    fontsize=18,
    fontweight='bold',
    pad=20
)

# Labels
plt.xlabel(
    "Area (Sqft)",
    fontsize=13,
    fontweight='bold'
)

plt.ylabel(
    "Rate per Sqft",
    fontsize=13,
    fontweight='bold'
)

# Format y-axis
plt.gca().yaxis.set_major_formatter(
    plt.FuncFormatter(lambda x, pos: f"₹{x:,.0f}")
)

# Grid
plt.grid(alpha=0.3)

# Clean look
sns.despine()

# Layout
plt.tight_layout()

# Save image
plt.savefig(
    "../images/area_vs_rate_per_sqft.png",
    dpi=300,
    bbox_inches='tight'
)

# Show plot
plt.show()

Property count by locality¶

In [91]:
top_localities = df["locality"].value_counts().head(10)

top_localities
Out[91]:
locality
sector 65     857
sector 79     576
sector 63     498

Name: count, dtype: int64

Visualization¶

In [92]:
plt.figure(figsize=(14,7))

# Style
sns.set_style("whitegrid")

# Plot
ax = sns.barplot(
    x=top_localities.values,
    y=top_localities.index,
    hue=top_localities.index,
    palette="crest",
    legend=False
)

# Title
plt.title(
    "Top 10 Localities by Number of Listings",
    fontsize=18,
    fontweight='bold',
    pad=20
)

# Labels
plt.xlabel(
    "Number of Properties",
    fontsize=13,
    fontweight='bold'
)

plt.ylabel(
    "Locality",
    fontsize=13,
    fontweight='bold'
)

# Value labels
for i, v in enumerate(top_localities.values):
    ax.text(
        v,
        i,
        f"{v:,}",
        va='center',
        fontsize=10,
        fontweight='bold'
    )

# Clean look
sns.despine()

# Layout
plt.tight_layout()

# Save image
plt.savefig(
    "../images/top_localities_by_listings.png",
    dpi=300,
    bbox_inches='tight'
)

# Show plot
plt.show()

Distribution of property prices¶

In [93]:
plt.figure(figsize=(12,7))

# Style
sns.set_style("whitegrid")

# Histogram
ax = sns.histplot(
    df["price"],
    bins=30,
    kde=True,
    color="royalblue",
    edgecolor="black",
    alpha=0.7
)

# Title
plt.title(
    "Distribution of Property Prices",
    fontsize=18,
    fontweight='bold',
    pad=20
)

# Labels
plt.xlabel(
    "Property Price",
    fontsize=13,
    fontweight='bold'
)

plt.ylabel(
    "Frequency",
    fontsize=13,
    fontweight='bold'
)

# Format x-axis in Crores
plt.gca().xaxis.set_major_formatter(
    plt.FuncFormatter(lambda x, pos: f"₹{x/10000000:.1f} Cr")
)

# Grid
plt.grid(alpha=0.3)

# Clean look
sns.despine()

# Layout
plt.tight_layout()

# Save image
plt.savefig(
    "../images/property_price_distribution.png",
    dpi=300,
    bbox_inches='tight'
)

# Show plot
plt.show()

Boxplot for outlier detection¶

In [94]:
plt.figure(figsize=(12,6))

# Style
sns.set_style("whitegrid")

# Boxplot
ax = sns.boxplot(
    x=df["price"],
    color="skyblue",
    linewidth=2,
    fliersize=5
)

# Title
plt.title(
    "Property Price Outliers",
    fontsize=18,
    fontweight='bold',
    pad=20
)

# Label
plt.xlabel(
    "Property Price",
    fontsize=13,
    fontweight='bold'
)

# Format x-axis in Crores
plt.gca().xaxis.set_major_formatter(
    plt.FuncFormatter(lambda x, pos: f"₹{x/10000000:.1f} Cr")
)

# Grid
plt.grid(alpha=0.3)

# Clean look
sns.despine(left=True)

# Layout
plt.tight_layout()

# Save image
plt.savefig(
    "../images/property_price_outliers.png",
    dpi=300,
    bbox_inches='tight'
)

# Show plot
plt.show()

Final Insights¶

  • Premium localities have significantly higher property prices and rate per sqft.
  • Ready-to-move properties generally cost more than under-construction properties.
  • RERA-approved properties show higher median pricing.
  • Area has a positive correlation with price.
  • Larger homes are not always more expensive per sqft.
  • Certain builders consistently price properties at premium levels.
  • Apartments generally dominate the Gurgaon real estate market.
  • Higher BHK configurations tend to have higher average prices.
In [ ]:
